item.title: PicoCTF_Cookies
item.description: Pico Web CTF : Cookies Hey there, Welcome to my page 😄.This is my first public CTF write-up. I chose to start with this challenge specifically because of how I find it to be a super beginner friendly challenge and I thought will find it to explain easily. I hope I don’t disappoint you 😏. This is a web CTF from PicoCTF called Cookies. This is what you get once you open it .

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hey There!! 👋 👋 Glad you are here 😄 .Thank you for taking your time to visit my website. Who Am I I’m James Angwenyi , but mostly go as MASARA I’m currently doing alot of exploring and learning I love to learn newer things in Cyber Security What am doing now I’m a final year Computer Science student I’m passionate about cybersecurity Currently, am continuously expanding and improving my skill set in the field.
